context_for_next_testing_agent: Scope Summary Panel feature is FULLY IMPLEMENTED and working. Key verification points: (1) Panel exists with data-testid='scope-summary-panel' at bottom of BulkCategoryEditorSections, (2) Toggle button with data-testid='scope-summary-toggle' expands/collapses panel, (3) Shows 'X attributes' count and 'X partially applied' warning when scopes exist, (4) Panel also appears in Apply Confirmation dialog in compact mode (collapsed by default), (5) Section headers (Categories, Filters, Specifications) are present, (6) P0 scope hydration fix from iteration_83 still working - scopes persist after save.
